zh.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morville於大約1085年出生在法國巴-諾門迪曼其傑爾布-可迪維爾瓦洛斯。他和Beatrice de Beauchamp至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1162年在英國英格蘭波藍德波 白 桑德斯享年78歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾德雷包。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moorfield
meanings: English: locative name from Morville (Shrops), which is recorded as Mamerfeld in the 12th century, Momerefeld in 1255, and Morfelde in 1464.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morville was born about 1085, in Valognes, Cherbourg-Octeville, Manche, Lower Normandy, France. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Beatrice de Beauchamp. He died in 1162, in Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Dryburgh, Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morville est né environ 1085, à Valognes, Cherbourg-Octeville, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Beatrice de Beauchamp. Il est décédé en 1162, à Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Dryburgh, Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Er starb 1162 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dryburgh, Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morvilleは約1085年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェチェルボウルグ-オクテヴィルヴァログンスで生まれた。彼はBeatrice de Beauchampとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1162年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドブルグ ビー サンズで78歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアドリブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.Burgh By Sands, Cumberland, England: 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 버그 비 샌드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morville(은)는 대략 1085년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 처보우르그-옥테빌 발그네스에서 태어났다. 그는 Beatrice de Beauchamp(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1162년 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 버그 비 샌드즈에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르 드리버그에 묻혔다.

Ele faleceu em 1162, em Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Dryburgh, Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Burgh By Sands, Cumberland, England: бург би сэндс, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morville родился около 1085 г. в местности валогнесь, чирбург-октевилл, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Beatrice de Beauchamp. Он умер в 1162 г. в местности бург би сэндс, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности дрибург, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
